prompt: Oh, hello there.  I hope I'm not calling at a bad time. My name is Margaret, and I was hoping to speak with someone about... well, about Cody Arnold. Is this the right place?

assertions.rubric: agent identifies emergency vs non-emergency before scheduling
agent never promises a specific time; defers to calendar link
agent confirms SMS sent only after tool returns success
TTFB under 800ms on greeting; barge-in honored within 200ms
handles all 5 canonical personas without rude/dismissive responses
